ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hvac_systems" (
  "hvac_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HVAC system */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone */,
  "hvac_type" TEXT /* Type of HVAC system */,
  "hvac_description" TEXT /* Description of the HVAC system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hvac_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "hvac_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HVAC system */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor readings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hvac_commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record in the hvac_data table */,
  "cooling_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for cooling */,
  "heating_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for heating */,
  "damper_command" REAL /* Command for the damper */,
  "reheat_valve_command" REAL /* Command for the reheat valve */,
  "supply_flow_setpoint" REAL /* Setpoint for supply flow */,
  "occupied_command" INTEGER /* Command for occupied status */,
  "occupied_status" INTEGER /* Occupied status of the zone (1 for occupied, 0 for unoccupied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm record */,
  "hvac_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HVAC system */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of alarm (e.g. temperature, pressure, flow rate) */,
  "alarm_message" TEXT /* Alarm message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alarm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_hvac_id FOREIGN KEY ("hvac_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("hvac_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "hvac_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HVAC system */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g. routine, repair, replacement) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Maintenance description */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_hvac_id FOREIGN KEY ("hvac_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("hvac_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "hvac_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HVAC system */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the energy consumption record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_hvac_id FOREIGN KEY ("hvac_id") REFERENCES hvac_systems ("hvac_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each HVAC system
Unit of measurement for the sensor readings
Unique identifier for each command record
Reference to the data record in the hvac_data table
Occupied status of the zone (1 for occupied, 0 for unoccupied)
Unique identifier for each alarm record
Type of alarm (e.g. temperature, pressure, flow rate)
Unique identifier for each maintenance record
Type of maintenance (e.g. routine, repair, replacement)
Unique identifier for each energy consumption record
Timestamp of the energy consumption record
